# Transcrição: 4. Scripts

- **Fonte:** 4. Scripts
- **Duração:** 02:22
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 02:22]

Scripts. If you don't know what to say, if you don't have a script, still make the call. Okay, I want you to understand this. Look, if you don't have a script, so what? Make the call. But if in a perfect world, in a perfect situation, a script would help you. Okay? One, it gives you a clear reason to call people, which you need. This is a major, major mistake people make when they're making phone calls. They ramble. They don't know why they're calling. I've had people literally call me, in the first three minutes, were like, wow, wow, wow, wow, wow, wow, wow, tell me about they were sick recently. I'm like, hey, you don't need to call me to tell me you're sick. I don't want to talk about when you were sick. Why? Because they don't have a script, no format, no playbook to read out. We have scripts in my office for every call, every call, including leaving a message. Otherwise, people get paralyzed. You get paralyzed without scripts. Some people get paralyzed with a script. Oh my gosh, I don't want to read from a script. Okay, make it up, dude. You don't sell anybody. You don't make any money. You're freaking dying. You're in the top, the bottom 5 or 6% of all the people on planet Earth making money. So you don't want to use a script? Just make it up. It's not working. Get a script. Okay? Get a script of a half a dozen calls. Maybe a dozen calls. Maybe lay them out. If you don't want my scripts, scripts that Fortune 100 companies pay us to have, scripts for the first day call, the second day call, the third call, the fourth call, four calls in four days. How about the fifth call on the fifth day? How about the manager's call on the fifth day, six calls in five days? How about the call 30 seconds after they left? How about the text message? Wouldn't you like scripts for all that? We have Fortune 100 companies that say, look, I want the videos and the scripts to every call that you make. Then they tweak them. They work them. You need scripts. Your people need scripts. I need an idea of what I'm going to say on the 12th call in the third month. And they're still not interested. Okay? Would you find that valuable? How about the 12th call in the ninth month they already bought from me? I'm running out of stuff to say. What do I talk about? What do I say? What message do I leave? You need scripts. Quit fighting them. You need them just like you need discipline, commitment, organization, and you know you need a CRM.
